name: surface
description: Marketplace for the surface plugin — ad-hoc structured input from recipients via ephemeral, distributable UI surfaces.

plugins.name: surface
plugins.description: Ad-hoc structured input from one or more recipients via a flexible, distributable interface. The agent generates an ephemeral, task-shaped UI surface of opaque-ID affordances, delivers the URL through any outbound channel, and autonomously drains submissions to react. Also strong for information-dense display. Not for durable apps or simple in-chat questions.
